Video.summary: The holdup-proof safe in Gus Lammerson's store proves anything but.
Video.title: The Holdup-Proof Safe

Video.summary: A West Point graduate has trouble adjusting to an Army unit in the West.
Video.title: Lieutenant Bungle

Video.summary: Two outlaws set upon Maggie Woolf and her father who are taking refuge from a storm.
Video.title: Storm Over Truckee

Video.summary: Fred Curry and Jesse Blount feud after they each file claims to the same mine.
Video.title: Feud at Dome Rock

Video.summary: A prospector has hit a vein, and he's not about to share it with anyone, not even his partner.
Video.title: The Breaking Point

Video.summary: Sante Fe faces an invasion by the American army and it's citizens are forced south.
Video.title: La Tules

Video.summary: A husband and wife catch trouble when they allow an Apache chief's granddaughter to stay with them.
Video.title: Suzie

Video.summary: Attorney William E. Borah defends a woman charged with murder in Nampa, Idaho.
Video.title: The Lion of Idaho

Video.summary: An outlaw and teamster help miners.
Video.title: The Debt

Video.summary: Crew chief Yank Van Duzen walks off a mining job in protest when the foremen ignore warnings.
Video.title: Grotto of Death

Video.summary: A cowboy explores a valley allegedly haunted by monks that were massacred a century earlier.
Video.title: Phantom Procession

Video.summary: A Native acquitted of murder under Sioux law must contend with the white man's 'lynch law' justice.
Video.title: With Honesty and Integrity

Video.summary: An inventor without enough animals to drive his wagon decides to build a sail to do the job.
Video.title: Thar She Blows

Video.summary: A retiring Arizona ranger chases one last crook.
Video.title: Measure of a Man

Video.summary: Hunting a large, mysterious creature.
Video.title: The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek

Image.alt: The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek

Video.summary: Partners in a mule team freighting business try to win the affections of a widow.
Video.title: Graydon's Charge

Video.summary: Winfield Stratton finds gold just after selling his mining claim to a syndicate.
Video.title: Sixty-Seven Miles of Gold

Video.summary: Patrick Manogue is challenged by a gambler as he tries to bring morality to Virginia City, Nev.
Video.title: The Westside of Heaven

Video.summary: Stephen Austin travels with his companion Valdez to purchase land in the Mexican territory of Texas.
Video.title: A Book of Spanish Grammar

Video.summary: A down-and-out cowboy pines after a wealthy rancher's daughter.
Video.title: See the Elephant and Hear the Owl

Image.alt: See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl

Video.summary: Mary likes the attention of many men, but that causes trouble when one is murdered over her.
Video.title: Queen of Spades

Video.summary: A man who claims he can resurrect the dead poses a problem for killer Bill Groat.
Video.title: Miracle at Boot Hill

Video.summary: Widow Lucy Tutaine decides to sue the railroad when her cow is hit by a train.
Video.title: The Train and Lucy Tutaine

Video.summary: A minister has ambitious, but not very popular, plans of building a church in Whiskey Gulch.
Video.title: Miracle at Whiskey Gulch

Video.summary: Dr. Charles Edwards arrives in a rough frontier town to set up practice.
Video.title: Pioneer Doctor

Video.summary: Pauline runs a saloon in Casa Grande and has shown she neither needs nor wants a husband.
Video.title: The Wooing of Perilous Pauline

Video.summary: An Indian girl must save a treaty.
Video.title: The Other White Man

Video.summary: A bear hunter and his daughters nurse an injured Easterner back to health.
Video.title: Peter the Hunter

Video.summary: Two newspaper editors compete for the right to publish Denver's first newspaper.
Video.title: The Race at Cherry Creek

Video.summary: Native brothers must find a tribal renegade.
Video.title: Death in the Desert

Video.summary: A besieged banker devises a way to get gold.
Video.title: Raid on the San Francisco Mint

Image.alt: Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint

Video.summary: A poet forges a relationship with a street waif.
Video.title: Magic Locket

Video.summary: Ronald Reagan plays a sheriff who tries enforcing the law without a gun.
Video.title: No Gun Behind His Badge

Video.summary: Susan Magoffin, accompanying her husband West, becomes the first woman to travel the Santa Fe Trail.
Video.title: No Place for a Lady

Video.summary: Mormon emigrant Jessica Scott loses her baby in unknown territory while traveling to Utah.
Video.title: The Red Shawl

Video.summary: A woman whose house is hit by a meteorite decides to sue God for damages.
Video.title: Canary Harris vs. the Almighty

Video.summary: In a brawling frontier town, Sister Blandina tries to stop a hanging.
Video.title: The Fastest Nun in the West

Image.alt: The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West

The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West

Video.summary: The skeletons of two prospectors give Ed Schieffelin a clue to the location of a silver mine.
Video.title: Silver Tombstone

Video.summary: A woman's loyalties are tested when her lawman boyfriend must arrest her outlaw brother.
Video.title: The Day They Stole the Salamander

Image.alt: The Day They Stole the Salamander
The Day They Stole the Salamander
The Day They Stole the Salamander
The Day They Stole the Salamander
The Day They Stole the Salamander
The Day They Stole the Salamander
The Day They Stole the Salamander
The Day They Stole the Salamander
The Day They Stole the Salamander

Video.summary: A recruit and his pet mule are the only hope for a besieged cavalry patrol.
Video.title: Honor the Name Dennis Driscoll

Video.summary: The theft of turkeys being brought to market sets up a showdown between lawlessness and justice.
Video.title: The Great Turkey War

Video.summary: A young Chinese man uses his ancient book to help a miner win money at roulette.
Video.title: The Book

Video.summary: A sheriff pursues deadly gunslinger Sam Bolt and finds an unlikely ally in one of Bolt's partners.
Video.title: Brute Angel
